title: Basis Risk: What is the impact of a short hedge if the...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: What is the impact of a short hedge if the basis weakens?

options.text: If the basis weakens, the short hedger will incur a loss

solution: If the basis weakens, the short hedger will incur a loss because the futures price decreases relative to the spot price, undermining the effectiveness of the hedge.
